characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmySpeciesHand puppetGenderFemalePlayed byStephanie D'AbruzzoAppearance"Sign Language!" Amyis a minor character onOobi. Amy is a deaf girl who guest stars in the "Sign Language!" episode. She uses hand signals to communicate with others. She lives with hermom, who knows a great deal about sign language.OobiandKakoseem to have something of a crush on her.

characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmySpeciesHand puppetGenderFemalePlayed byStephanie D'AbruzzoAppearance"Sign Language!" Amyis a minor character onOobi. characters.name: Amy's mom
characters.description: Amy's momSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemaleAppearance"Sign Language!" Amy's momis a minor character onOobi. Amy's mom only appears in the "Sign Language!" episode. She is the single parent ofAmy, a deaf girl who becomes friends withOobiandKako. When the boys first meet her, Amy's mother introduces them to sign language. She "translates" what Amy says to Oobi and Kako in sign language, then teaches them some basic gestures so that they can communicate. She shows them how to sign the letters of their names and how to say "friends" and "goodbye."

She "translates" what Amy says to Oobi and Kako in sign language, then teaches them some basic gestures so that they can communicate. She shows them how to sign the letters of their names and how to say "friends" and "goodbye."

characters.name: Angus
characters.description: AngusSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byMatt Vogel Angusis a recurring character onOobi. He is one ofInka's piano students and a good friend ofOobi. He was played byMatt Vogel. Angus is a nerdy kid with a high-pitched, nasal voice. He lives on the same street asOobiandKako, and he is good friends with them. He could be described as the polar opposite of Oobi. While Oobi is calm and collected, Angus is high-strung and almost always nervous. His eyes are underneath his hand, unlike most other characters, making him self-conscious. He is prone to stage fright and often needs his friends to calm him down.

characters.name: Astronaut
characters.description: AstronautSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byMatt VogelAppearance"Grown-Up!" Theastronautis a minor character onOobi. The astronaut is an adult hand puppet who works at a far-away space station. He only appears at the end of the "Grown-Up!" episode, when he walks byOobi'shouse. He floats up and down as if he were on the moon.Grampuis in awe at the astronaut and thinks he's cool. Oobi, on the other hand, isn't impressed and insists that kids are cooler than grown-ups, even astronauts. The astronaut doesn't have any lines but can be heard making breathing sounds.

characters.name: Aunt Oota
characters.description: Aunt OotaSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemaleFamilyOobi(nephew)Uma(niece)Grampu(father or father-in-law)Appearance"Recital!"(mentioned) Aunt Ootais an unseen character onOobi. Aunt Oota is the aunt ofOobiandUma. She’s also eitherGrampu's daughter or daughter-in-law. Like the rest of her family, her name has the "oo" sound in it. She never makes an appearance on the show, but is mentioned in the "Recital!" episode when Grampu explains that Uma is visiting Oota for the day.

characters.name: Background puppets
characters.description: Background puppetsSpeciesHand puppetsGenderMale and femalePlayed byVarious Thebackground puppetsare minor characters onOobi. The background puppets are the townspeople of the show. They usually appear to populate public areas or fill up space in wide shots. A few unnamed puppets are given small speaking roles, though most of them have no lines at all.

characters.name: Barber
characters.description: BarberSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Haircut!" Thebarberis a minor character onOobi. The barber is the friendly, hard-working, and mostly quiet owner of the local hair salon. He is a very skilled hair stylist and takes pride in his work. He has a gruff voice, but he doesn't speak very often.

characters.name: Barber
characters.description: BarberSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Haircut!" Thebarberis a minor character onOobi. characters.name: Bella
characters.description: BellaSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemalePlayed byLisa Buckley Bellais a recurring character onOobi. She is the owner of the local grocery store. She was played byLisa Buckley. Bella is the owner and only employee of thefruit store. It is similar to a supermarket, but it only sells fruit. Bella does every job: stocking the shelves, working the cash register, and of course, cleaning up when someone makes a mess in one of the aisles.Grampuis her best customer and good friend. Bella talks with a thick Italian accent.

She has a bluetooth on and talks quickly and loudly about her job:

characters.name: Chauncy
characters.description: ChauncySpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Checkup!" Chauncyis a minor character onOobi. Chauncy only appears in the "Checkup!" episode. He is one ofDr. Rose's patients. WhenOobigoes to visit Dr. Rose for the first time, he sees Chauncy leaving her office. Chauncy tells Oobi that the doctor is nice. Chauncy's mom signals for him to leave, and he walks out of the waiting room. Chauncy seems to have a runny nose, since he can be heard sniffling while he talks. He most likely visited Dr. Rose for a checkup related to a cold or allergies.

characters.name: Chauncy's Mother
characters.description: Chauncy's MotherSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemalePlayed byStephanie D'AbruzzoAppearance"Checkup!" Chauncy's motheris a minor character onOobi. Chauncy's mother is the caretaker ofChauncy. She only appears in the "Checkup!" episode, where she brings Chauncy to his pediatricianDr. Rose's office. She might be mute, since she never talks and does hand motions to communicate with Chauncy. Her skin is visibly lighter than Chauncy's, so his father most likely has darker skin.

characters.name: Chipmunk
characters.description: ChipmunkSpeciesChipmunk hand puppetGenderMaleAppearance"Nature Walk!" Thechipmunkis a woodland creature who appears in "Nature Walk!". The chipmunk lives at the local state park. WhenOobi,Uma, andGrampugo on a nature walk, they spot the chipmunk eating an acorn. They keep their distance from it, making sure not to disturb it while it eats. Like most of the animals on the show, the chipmunk doesn't talk, but it can be heard chittering.

characters.name: Cliff
characters.description: CliffSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Valentine!" Cliffis a minor character onOobi. Cliff is the local mailman who delivers packages to residents ofOobi'sneighborhood. He talks with a cartoonish, exaggerated voice, similar toKermit the Frogfrom the Muppets.

characters.name: Delivery woman
characters.description: Delivery womanSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemalePlayed byJennifer BarnhartAppearance"Valentine!" Thedelivery womanis a minor character onOobi. The delivery woman is an unnamed hand puppet who works for the postal service. She only appears in the "Valentine!" episode, where she delivers a card fromInkatoGrampuon Valentine's Day. She most likely works withCliff, the local mailman who is seen in the same episode.

characters.name: Dino-Kako
characters.description: Dino-KakoSpeciesDinosaur hand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Dinosaur!" Dino-KakoisKako's dinosaur counterpart and a minor character onOobi. He was played byNoel MacNeal. Dino-Kako is a fictional dinosaur who appears in the "Dinosaur!" episode. Like the normal Kako, he is goofy and sometimes self-centered. He was created byOobifor a storybook he wrote, called "The LostUmasaurus." In the book, Dino-Kako helps a young dinosaur named Umasaurus find her way home. When Dino-Kako finds out that her path is blocked by a boulder, he claims to be extremely strong and tries to push it away by himself.

characters.name: Dr. Rose
characters.description: Dr. RoseSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemaleFamilyUnnamed BrotherPlayed byLisa BuckleyAppearance"Checkup!" Dr. RoseisOobi's doctor and a minor character on the show. ﻿Dr. Rose guest stars in the "Checkup!" episode, where she is the main focus. She is a caring pediatrician who works at the local doctor's office. She has taken care ofOobi,MoppieandChauncy. She always makes sure to calm her patients when they are nervous around her.

characters.name: Dr. Rose
characters.description: Dr. RoseSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemaleFamilyUnnamed BrotherPlayed byLisa BuckleyAppearance"Checkup!" characters.name: Eagle
characters.description: EagleSpeciesEagle hand puppetAppearance"Nature Walk!" Theeagleis a bird who appears in "Nature Walk!". The eagle appears at the end of the episode. WhenOobi,Uma, andGrampugo on a nature walk, Uma really wants to see an eagle. Grampu explains that they're rare and usually don't show up, but Uma crosses her fingers and hopes that she'll get to see one anyway. The family quickly finds a patch of flowers and achipmunk, but they reach the end of the nature trail without seeing an eagle. Uma is disappointed but cheers up a little when she sees a beautiful sunset.

characters.name: Firefighters
characters.description: FirefightersSpeciesHand puppetsGenderMalePlayed byMatt VogelJames GodwinAppearance"Grown-Up!" Thefirefightersare minor characters onOobi. The firefighters only appear in "Grown-Up!" for a few seconds, driving quickly pastOobi's house. They are two members of the local fire department. One drives a tiny red firetruck while the other holds a ladder.

characters.name: Fish
characters.description: FishSpeciesFreshwater fishGenderUnknownPlayed byMatt VogelAppearance"Fishing!" Thefishis a salmon-like fish puppet who appears in "Fishing!". The fish lives in the lake by thepier, whereOobiandGrampugo fishing. They wait all day to catch a fish and hardly get any bites. When they finally do, Grampu is proud of Oobi for reeling it in. However, after seeing how unhappy the fish is out of the water, Oobi convinces Grampu to throw it back and let it live.

characters.name: Frankie
characters.description: FrankieSpeciesFoot puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Frieda Friend!" Frankieis a minor character onOobi. Frankie is one ofFrieda's friends. Like Frieda, he is a talking foot puppet. He talks with an exaggerated Southern accent. He is notably the only male foot to make an appearance in the series.

characters.name: Fred
characters.description: FredSpeciesHand puppetGenderMalePlayed byNoel MacNealAppearance"Uma Preschool!" Fredis a minor character onOobi. He was played byNoel MacNeal, who also playedKako. Fred is one ofUma's preschool classmates. He is best friends withTaroand has a good-natured sense of humor. He seems to be the class clown. He has a pet hamster, which he misses when he is at school.

characters.name: Fred

characters.name: Frieda the Foot
characters.description: FriedaSpeciesFoot puppetGenderFemalePlayed byCheryl Blaylock Frieda the Footis a recurring character onOobi. She is an upside-down foot puppet.Oobihas a bit of a crush on her. She was played byCheryl Blaylock. Unlike the other characters, Frieda is afootpuppet instead of a hand. Being a foot, Frieda's favorite things are soccer and dressing up in fancy shoes. Whenever she says something, her toes move up and down to give the impression that she's talking.

characters.name: Grampu
characters.description: GrampuSpeciesHand puppetGenderMaleHomeOobi's houseFamilyGrandson:OobiGranddaughter:UmaDaughter:Aunt OotaPlayed byTyler BunchFirst appearance"Dance!"Last appearance"Superheroes!" Grampuis one of the main characters ofthe show. He isOobiandUma's grandfather. He was played byTyler Bunch. Grampu isOobiandUma's grandpa and guardian. He almost always has his hands full taking care of the kids. His biggest goal in life is to make sure his grandchildren grow up smart and happy. Grampu introduces them to new ideas, like how to paint a picture or make music, on a daily basis. He thinks being Oobi's grandfather is "lovely."

characters.name: Grampu
characters.description: GrampuSpeciesHand puppetGenderMaleHomeOobi's houseFamilyGrandson:OobiGranddaughter:UmaDaughter:Aunt OotaPlayed byTyler BunchFirst appearance"Dance!"Last appearance"Superheroes!" He almost always has his hands full taking care of the kids. His biggest goal in life is to make sure his grandchildren grow up smart and happy. Grampu introduces them to new ideas, like how to paint a picture or make music, on a daily basis. He thinks being Oobi's grandfather is "lovely."

characters.name: Grampusaurus
characters.description: GrampusaurusSpeciesDinosaur hand puppetGenderMalePlayed byTyler BunchAppearance"Dinosaur!" GrampusaurusisGrampu's dinosaur counterpart and a minor character onOobi. He was played byTyler Bunch. Grampusaurus is a fictional dinosaur. He appears in the "Dinosaur!" episode, whereOobiwrites his own storybook called "The LostUmasaurus." It is about a young dino named Umasaurus, who gets lost in the jungle. She tries to find her way back home to Grampusaurus, her grandpa. Grampusaurus is mentioned throughout the story, but doesn't appear until the end, when Umasaurus finally comes home and reunites with him. He hugs her and  bakes delicious brownies ("dino snacks") for his granddaughter and her friends,Oobi-RexandDino-Kako.

characters.name: Grampusaurus

It is about a young dino named Umasaurus, who gets lost in the jungle. She tries to find her way back home to Grampusaurus, her grandpa. Grampusaurus is mentioned throughout the story, but doesn't appear until the end, when Umasaurus finally comes home and reunites with him. He hugs her and  bakes delicious brownies ("dino snacks") for his granddaughter and her friends,Oobi-RexandDino-Kako.

characters.name: Great-Grandmamu
characters.description: Great-GrandmamuSpeciesHand puppetGenderFemaleFamilyMamu(granddaughter or granddaughter-in-law)Papu(grandson or grandson-in-law)Kako(great grandson)Played byNoel MacNealAppearance"Kako Dinner!" Great-Grandmamuis a minor character onOobi. Great-Grandmamu isKako's great-grandmother. She’s also the grandmother of eitherMamuorPapu. She never appears on the show, but a photo of her can be seen in the "Kako Dinner!" episode. WhenOobivisitsKako's house, he sees a wall of family photos. One is of Great-Grandmamu; it’s in black-and-white and shows her sitting in a rocking chair. Since she never shows up in person, it's unknown if she’s deceased or just very old.
